name: Super Liquid Soccer
short_description: Super Liquid Soccer is a fun arcade style 7 aside soccer/real football game coming soon for PC and Mac. A game for those less worried about simulating every blade of grass and more about epic battles amongst friends, last minute winners, cynical fouls, bullet headers and questionable tactics.
detailed_description:
Super Liquid Soccer is a fun arcade style 7 aside football game coming soon for PC and Mac

- Fun fluid gameplay
- Multiple teams featuring generations of great players
- Tournament modes
- Local player vs player
- Team creator : build your team and take on the worlds best, via pub teams, amateurs, professionals and internationals.


Harking back to when soccer games were less worried about simulating every minor detail and more about epic battles amongst friends, last minute winners, cynical fouls, unstoppable shots, bullet headers, questionable tactics and excessive celebrations.

guaranteed no loot boxes, offside, VAR or super leagues.
